chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ أَلْوَانٌ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ فَيَخْلِطُ بَعْضَهَا بِبَعْضٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – The man who happens to have a variety of foodstuffs with him, so he mixes some with the other

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/187)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/187)
text: هُ سُئِلَ عَنِ الطَّعَامِ يُخْلَطُ بَعْضُهُ بِبَعْضٍ وَ بَعْضُهُ أَجْوَدُ مِنْ بَعْضٍ قَالَ إِذَا رُئِيَا جَمِيعاً فَلَا بَأْسَ مَا لَمْ يُغَطِّ الْجَيِّدُ الرَّدِيَّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al A’ala, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about the foodstuff, some with the others, and some of it is fresher than some’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When you see the whole of it, so there is no problem for as long as the fresher does not cover the spoilt’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-‘Ala’ from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, (abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah), ‘Alayhim al-Salam, was asked about foodstuff of high and low quality mixed together. He (the Imam) said, ‘If they see all of it, it is not harmful as long as that of good quality does not cover that of low quality.’”
